message:
⚡ Progressive logo loading, batch DB writes, disable sandbox (#78)

- Batch logo DB updates in single transaction (updateChannelLogos)
- Progressive loading: favorites first, then batches of 200 with yields
- 6-hour cooldown cache to avoid redundant re-resolution
- Remove EPG debug log spam from channels_screen
- Add ensureIndex() to LogoResolverService for pre-loading
- Disable macOS app sandbox for ffmpeg proxy process spawning

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
